name: Potato Soup for Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Flour mixed with 1/2 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ingredients 1 through 8 in the crockpot.
2. Cook on low for 6-8 hours or until the potatoes are tender.
3. About 30 minutes before serving, stir in the milk and flour-water mixture.
4. Continue cooking until the soup thickens to your desired consistency.
5. If desired, add a quarter pound of Velveeta cheese for a creamy texture.
Alternatively, substitute with 1 can of evaporated milk.
